notes: The cloud Sync Slot ID is now locked by default on every device, so it can't be edited or replaced by accident. Unlocking asks for confirmation first and explains the risk (changing the ID can disconnect the device from its backup); locking again is instant. Entering an ID for the first time on a fresh device still works without unlocking.
New Copy button next to the Sync Slot ID copies it straight to the clipboard with a quick confirmation toast — no window or prompt opens.
